system.description: A Space Marine descending into battle on trails of fire is a true angel of death come to bring ruin and ending on all who stand in his way.
system.benefit: When the Battle-Brother makes a Charge Action using a jump pack, his melee attack deals an extra 1d10 Damage for every two Degrees of Success, to a maximum bonus of 2d10.

specialAbilities.name: Death from Above
specialAbilities.description: When you make a Charge Action whilst using a Jump Pack, your melee attack deals an extra 1d10 damage per two degrees of success on the melee attack you make at the end of your charge (maximum 2d10).
